{{Infobox Player |page_type=Player |isretired=Yes |isretiredplayer=No |towildrift=No |low_content=No |id=ChumpJohn |name=Johnson Ranta |pronoun=He |checkboxAutoImage=Yes |country=Canada |residency=North America |checkbox-res=No |birth_date_year=1991 |birth_date_month=July |birth_date_day=29 |favchamp=Teemo |favchamp2=Shyvana |favchamp3=Gnar |checkbox1=No |checkboxComp=No |checkboxAutoTeams=Yes |checkbox2=No |role=Top |checkboxIsSub=No |issub1=No |istrainee1=No |issub2=No |istrainee2=No |issub3=No |istrainee3=No |issub4=No |istrainee4=No |issub5=No |istrainee5=No |checkbox3=No |issub6=No |istrainee6=No |issub7=No |istrainee7=No |issub8=No |istrainee8=No |issub9=No |istrainee9=No |issub10=No |istrainee10=No |issub11=No |istrainee11=No |issub12=No |istrainee12=No |issub13=No |istrainee13=No |issub14=No |istrainee14=No |issub15=No |istrainee15=No |issub16=No |istrainee16=No |issub17=No |istrainee17=No |issub18=No |istrainee18=No |issub19=No |istrainee19=No |issub20=No |istrainee20=No |issub21=No |istrainee21=No |issub22=No |istrainee22=No |issub23=No |istrainee23=No |issub24=No |istrainee24=No |issub25=No |istrainee25=No |stream=https://www.twitch.tv/chumpjohn |twitter=ImChumpJohn |checkboxSuppressOrgNavbox=No |checkboxSBS=Yes |checkboxTOCR=Yes |checkboxPrev=No }} ==Biography== Johnson Ranta hails from Cache Creek, British Columbia, Canada. He started playing videogames at a young age, and has played several different genres of games professionally. Prior to playing League of Legends, Ranta played World of Warcraft, where his smurf druid reached Rank 1 worldwide. He began playing League of Legends in Season 2, and initially played {{ci|Graves}} heavily before eventually settling into the role of top lane. ===Season 3=== In June 2013, ChumpJohn joined [[SouLControL]] as their top laner. He competed with them in the [[SoloMid IPL6 Qualifier]], where they fell 0-1 to [[Cloud9]] in the winners bracket, and then fell to [[WE DA BEST]] 0-1 in the losers bracket. ===2014 Season=== In February 2014, ChumpJohn joined [[Area of Effect eSports|Area of Effect]] as their top laner. With AoE, ChumpJohn won numerous Go4LoL's, and placing in the 5-8th category in both the [[2014 Black Monster Cup North America Summer|2014 Black Monster Cup NA Summer]] and [[2014 Black Monster Cup North America Spring|2014 Black Monster Cup NA Spring]]. Ultimately, AoE placed in the 5-8th category in the [[2014 NA Challenger Series/Summer Series|2014 NA Challenger Series - Summer]]
In June, Ranta parted ways with AoE and joined Monstar KittenZ as their top laner. Monstar KittenZ qualified for the [[Riot League Championship Series/North America/2015 Season/Spring Expansion|LCS 2015 Season NA Spring Expansion Tournament]] through Ranked 5's ladder placement but then lost to [[compLexity.White]] 1-2 in the first round of the tournament. ===2015 Season=== ChumpJohn joined [[Zenith eSports]] as their new starting top laner in February 2015. They competed in the [[2015 NA Challenger Series/Summer Qualifier|NACS Summer Qualifier]] but lost to [[Team Liquid Academy]] in the first round 0-2. == Trivia == * He is an avid Tetris player. * His favorite console game is Super Smash Bros. 64. * He is 6'8" tall. {{PlayerStatsTrivia}} ==Tournament Results== {{PlayerResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} {{PlayerResults1v1|show=overviewpage}} == Media == {{PlayerMedia}} === Images === {{PlayerProfileGallery}} {{PlayerPageEnd}}
